tables.caption: Fee Table: Other Fees

cells.text: Bank Return on Withdrawal/Transfer out of PayPal
This fee is charged when a withdrawal/transfer out of PayPal is attempted by a user and it fails because incorrect bank account information or delivery information is provided.

This fee will apply for requests of information relating to why we had reasonable justification to refuse your payment order. We will not charge you for records requested in connection with your good-faith assertion of an error in your PayPal account.
This is an electronic device that creates a unique security code that you use to log in to your PayPal account.
